error.device_or_sources: Select a device or enable additional sensors to choose sources manually.
error.no_matching_sources: The selected device does not have any supported sensor sources. Select sources manually or choose another device.
error.no_sources: At least one sensor source must be selected.
error.only_one_voc_sensor: Select either a tVOC sensor or a VOC index sensor, not both.

reconfigure.description: Update the rating standard or sensor sources for this Indoor Air Quality entry.

data_description.co: Optional CO source used for the air quality calculation.
data_description.co2: Optional CO₂ source used for the air quality calculation.
data_description.hcho: Optional formaldehyde source used for the air quality calculation.
data_description.humidity: Optional humidity source used for the air quality calculation.
data_description.name: Friendly name for this air quality sensor. Defaults to the device name.
data_description.no2: Optional NO₂ source used for the air quality calculation.
data_description.pm: Optional particulate matter sources used for the air quality calculation.
data_description.radon: Optional radon source used for the air quality calculation.
data_description.temperature: Optional temperature source used for the air quality calculation.
data_description.tvoc: Optional total VOC source used for the air quality calculation.
data_description.voc_index: Optional VOC index source used for the air quality calculation.

sources.description: Review the automatically selected sensors or add more sources.

data_description.device_id: The integration will automatically use supported sensor entities from this device.
data_description.show_source_options: Enable this to add or override source sensors before creating the IAQ sensor.
data_description.standard: Air quality rating standard used to score the configured sources.

user.description: Select the device that provides your air quality readings, or enable manual sensor selection.
